backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (appointments, clients, financial stats, reports) and serving as the backend entry point with authorization mixins for a scheduling/revenue management app.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three requirements for the RapportPDFPage: adding a report type selector (monthly/annual), a year dropdown for annual reports, and annual aggregation logic that sums monthly data across all 12 months.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Catalogue of concise summaries for all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Mon Agenda Revenus', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, profile setup modal, and TanStack Router configuration with routes for Dashboard, RapportPDFPage, and ClientDatabasePage.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog component presenting edit (single or all future client appointments) and delete options for a selected appointment, delegating to AppointmentDialog and AppointmentDeleteDialog.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Alert dialog component that lets the user choose between deleting a single appointment or all future appointments for the same client, with loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: A dialog component for creating and editing appointments, with fields for client info, date/time, service, payment, and recurrence options (weekly/monthly/annual). Uses React Query hooks to add or update appointments and fetches client records for autocomplete.
Displays a tabbed list of appointments split into paid and unpaid, showing client details, date, time, and recurrence info. Clicking an appointment opens an action dialog for further operations.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: A form field component for uploading and previewing a client photo, automatically cropping it to 35×45mm format. Handles file validation, image processing, and removal.
frontend/src/components/ComptaMoisCalend: A monthly calendar table view for accounting, displaying appointments in time-slot rows and day columns with inline editing for payment amounts and comments. Supports month navigation and integrates with React Query for data fetching and updates.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: A dashboard card component showing three financial KPIs for the current month: total revenue received, total amounts due, and total appointment amounts. Displays formatted numbers with color-coded values.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header with app branding, authenticated navigation links (dashboard, PDF report, client database), a new appointment button, and a user dropdown menu with logout. Renders the AppointmentDialog when the new appointment button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a detailed monthly listing table per client showing appointment counts, revenues, credits, and balances, with support for manual January credit overrides and memoized row/total calculations.
frontend/src/components/MonthlySummarySe: Displays a yearly summary card table showing 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' for each month and a total, calculated by aggregating monthly listing rows from all appointments.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including CRUD operations for user profiles, client records, appointments, and financial/PDF report data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and reusable typography and table layout component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AgendaPage.tsx: Empty file with no content; agenda page not yet implemented.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: Full CRUD page for managing client records, with a form for adding/editing clients (including photo), a sortable table listing all clients, delete confirmation dialog, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ComptaMoisPage.tsx: Empty file with no content; monthly accounting page not yet implemented.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying monthly financial overview cards, a monthly listing table, a calendar table, and a yearly summary section with month navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/ListingMensuelPage.ts: Empty file with no content; monthly listing page not yet implemented.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login landing page that displays app features and a button to authenticate via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Page for generating and downloading monthly or annual PDF reports by aggregating appointment data into MonthlyListingRow calculations per client.
frontend/src/pages/SemainePage.tsx: Empty file with no content; weekly view page not yet implemented.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint arithmetic including abs, clamp, sum, min, and max to avoid precision loss from Number conversion.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utilities to convert an array of objects to a CSV string with proper escaping and trigger a browser file download with UTF-8 BOM.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Utilities to crop and resize an image file to a 35×45mm passport-photo aspect ratio returning a Uint8Array, and to convert a stored Uint8Array photo to a blob URL for display.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Provides pure utility functions for monthly listing calculations (RDV Faits, Revenus, Crédit Positif/Négatif) using a two-pass approach with bigint nanosecond timestamps to correctly carry forward credits across all 12 months of a year.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Utility functions for converting year/month values to nanosecond bigint timestamps and checking whether a given timestamp falls within a month range or is not in the future.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, extended border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the current feature set (monthly PDF report) and a pending feature request (AR-1) to add annual report selection with year dropdown and 12-month aggregation to the PDF Report page.
